title: Just One Little Taste
lesson: Being brave enough to try a new healthy food can lead to a yummy surprise.
prompts: At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits, resting their chin on one hand and eyeing a plate of colourful broccoli and carrots, with a wary, unsure expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} sits with their own plate, lifting a forkful and smiling gently. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits gently pushing the plate of green broccoli away, with a reluctant, frowning expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} leans in, resting a hand on the table and watching with patient encouragement. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits, with a curious, considering expression, holding a small fork with one piece of broccoli. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} smiles warmly and gives an encouraging nod. Exactly two people in the frame — the child and one adult — and no one else. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with both hands pressed to their cheeks in delight, having just taken a bite, with eyes wide open and a surprised smile, realising the food is delicious. A plate of colourful vegetables in front of them. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a cozy family dinner table in the evening, warm indoor light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits happily eating from the plate, with a joyful smile. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} claps softly, looking proud and pleased. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: At a cozy evening family dinner table, the child rests their chin on a hand eyeing a plate of broccoli and carrots warily while the mother lifts a forkful, smiling gently.
At the dinner table, the child pushes the plate of broccoli away with a frown, reluctant, while the mother leans in watching with patient encouragement.
At the dinner table, the child holds a fork with one piece of broccoli, curious and considering, while the mother gives an encouraging nod — exactly two people. Deciding to try.
At the dinner table, the child sits alone in close view taking a brave first little bite of broccoli, eyes scrunched.
At the dinner table, the child sits alone with hands pressed to their cheeks in delight, eyes wide with a surprised smile — realising the food is delicious.
At the dinner table, the child happily eats from the plate, joyful, while the mother claps, proud — being brave to try was tasty.
texts: At dinner you looked at the green broccoli and orange carrots. Hmm — you weren't so sure about them.
You pushed the plate away with a frown. "I don't want to," you said. Mum waited patiently.
"Just try one little taste," said Mum with a kind nod. You picked up your fork with one piece.
You scrunched your eyes shut and took a tiny, brave bite. Crunch!
Then your eyes popped wide open. It was yummy! What a delicious surprise!
You happily ate up your veggies. Mum clapped, so proud. Being brave was tasty after all!
